name: Casey Cloudwalker
title: Community Builder · Containers
tagline: Turns deployment postmortems into meetup talks.
factoids: Runs a monthly cloud-native study group.
Believes the hallway track is the best conference track.
Can explain a Kubernetes rollout with a whiteboard and three sticky notes.
jokes: I tried to make a container joke, but it would not run outside my cluster.
My deployment is very social: it always needs a rolling update.

interaction.greeting: Hi! Looking for a session, a coffee, or a good architecture debate?
dialogue: The best community conversations start with a specific problem.
If you are heading to the Expo, pace yourself — it is bigger than it looks.
